pattern: ESP32 LED projection system increases situational awareness and reduces cognitive load compared to terminal-only monitoring over 7-day period. Hypothesis: operators will show +25% improvement in sustained attention metrics (mouse interactions per hour, session duration) when ESP32 daemon is running at 192.168.4.38 vs baseline terminal usage.
details: Measurement via analytics infrastructure: viz_server.py on :8765 projects state; event_server.js on :8767 captures mouse_move events from cortana.html. Success criterion: interaction_rate_esp32 >= 1.25 * interaction_rate_baseline over 7 days. Falsification: <25% improvement or zero data indicates browser-based ambient presence model misaligned with operator needs.
